calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Continued To Jan-09-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Irene Burns.
Francisco Torres, Esq., for Plaintiff: Conard House Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Markyle Henderson, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Angelo Dunklin.
Exhibit #1 - Ten-Days Notice--------------ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff for restitution and possession of premises located at 270 McAllister St., #303, San Francisco, forfeiture of the rental agreement, Back Rent and Damages of $2,006.33 and costs of $274.80.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: FRANCISCO G. TORRES FOR PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE INC. WITH MARKEL HENDERSON, PROPERTY MANAGER
DEFENDANT ANGELO DUNKLIN NOT PRESENT

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT ORDERS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR AND THE JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.
MATTER IS TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; NOT REPORTED (218)
